info.title: Parallax API
info.description: Financial data and portfolio analytics API. Analyze portfolios with multi-currency support, rebalancing, and comprehensive metrics.

post.description: Analyze a portfolio with multi-currency support, rebalancing, and comprehensive metrics. This endpoint uses async job processing - submit your request, receive a job ID, then poll for results.

200.description: Job created successfully. Poll the check_url for results.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Check the status of an async job. Poll this endpoint until status is 'completed' or 'failed'.

parameters.name: job_id
parameters.description: The job ID returned from the analyze endpoint

401.description: Unauthorized

post.description: Get AI-powered technical analysis including trend analysis, momentum indicators (RSI, MACD), support/resistance levels, volume analysis, and volatility assessment. This endpoint uses async job processing - submit your request, receive a job ID, then poll for results.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL.O for Apple Inc)

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force regeneration even if cached analysis exists

202.description: Job created successfully. Poll the check_url for results.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Get comprehensive AI-powered financial analysis including business strategy, accounting quality, financial performance, and investment recommendation. Analysis typically takes 2-5 minutes.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL.O for Apple Inc)

202.description: Job created successfully. Poll the check_url for results.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Generate a comprehensive stock report including financial analysis, valuation metrics, and AI-generated insights. This endpoint uses async job processing - submit your request, receive a job ID, then poll for results.

202.description: Job created successfully. Poll the check_url for results.

example.message: Stock report generation started for AAPL.O. Poll the check_url to get results.

example.detail: Invalid symbol 'INVALID': No company data found for this symbol.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Fetch macro economic report for a specific market. Returns report metadata and optionally the full report content. This is a synchronous endpoint - results are returned immediately.

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: Market name (e.g., 'United States', 'Japan', 'Germany')

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Response format: 'json' or 'pdf'

parameters.name: include_content
parameters.description: For JSON format: embed the full report content in the response

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Report date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit to get the latest report.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

404.description: Market not found or no report available

example.detail: No macro report found for market 'Atlantis'

get.description: Get a list of all markets with available macro reports.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Get comprehensive company information including description, sector, market data, latest price, and Parallax factor scores.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, 0700.HK). Comma-separated for multiple.

example.description: Apple Inc. designs, manufactures and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables and accessories...
example.name: Apple Inc

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Get a list of peer companies for a given stock, including valuation metrics, performance, and Parallax scores.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT)

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Generate an AI-powered news analysis for a stock. Scans recent news and produces a concise summary with key takeaways. This endpoint uses async job processing.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT)

202.description: Job created successfully. Poll the check_url for results.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Generate an AI-powered peer comparison analysis for a stock. Compares the company against its sector peers on valuation, performance, and fundamentals. This endpoint uses async job processing.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT)

202.description: Job created successfully. Poll the check_url for results.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Generate an AI-powered narrative analysis of a stock's Parallax factor scores, interpreting what the scores mean in the current market context. This endpoint uses async job processing.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT)

202.description: Job created successfully. Poll the check_url for results.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Build a thematic stock universe from a natural language query. An AI agent interprets your query, searches ~65,000 company descriptions, and returns relevant stocks ranked by relevance score. This endpoint uses async job processing.

example.query: Find me top 50 electric vehicle companies in Asia

202.description: Job created successfully. Poll the check_url for results.

example.query: Top 20 electric vehicle companies in Asia
example.message: Building stock universe for 'Top 20 electric vehicle companies in Asia'.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Get historical daily OHLCV price data for a stock.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT). Comma-separated for multiple.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 1 year ago.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to latest available.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Check if a stock symbol is valid and get its resolved RIC.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol to validate (e.g., AAPL, RELIANCE)

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve balance sheet data for a given stock symbol. Returns assets, liabilities, and equity line items sourced from LSEG Datastream.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL.O, 0700.HK). Ticker shorthand like AAPL is also accepted.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of periods to return

parameters.name: freq
parameters.description: 1 for Annual, 2 for Quarterly

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve income statement data for a given stock symbol. Returns line items from revenue through to EPS, sourced from LSEG Datastream.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL.O, 0700.HK). Ticker shorthand like AAPL is also accepted.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of periods to return

parameters.name: freq
parameters.description: 1 for Annual, 2 for Quarterly

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve cash flow statement data for a given stock symbol. Returns operating, investing, and financing cash flows sourced from LSEG Datastream.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL.O, 0700.HK). Ticker shorthand like AAPL is also accepted.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of periods to return

parameters.name: freq
parameters.description: 1 for Annual, 2 for Quarterly

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve key financial ratios for a given stock symbol. Returns profitability, liquidity, leverage, and efficiency ratios sourced from LSEG Datastream.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL.O, 0700.HK). Ticker shorthand like AAPL is also accepted.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of periods to return

parameters.name: freq
parameters.description: 1 for Annual, 2 for Quarterly

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Get a comprehensive profile for an ETF including metadata, latest price, market cap, and Parallax factor scores.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: ETF symbol (e.g., SPY, QQQ). Comma-separated for multiple.

example.name: STATE STREET SPDR S&P 500 ETF TRUST

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Get the top holdings of an ETF with their weights and Parallax factor scores.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: ETF symbol (e.g., SPY, QQQ). Comma-separated for multiple.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of holdings to return

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Get Parallax factor scores for an ETF, calculated as weighted averages across its holdings.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: ETF symbol (e.g., SPY, QQQ). Comma-separated for multiple.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Search and filter ETFs by name, market, currency, score, and recommendation.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search ETF name (partial match, e.g., S&P, Vanguard)

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: Filter by market (e.g., UNITED STATES, UNITED KINGDOM)

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Filter by currency (e.g., USD, EUR)

parameters.name: min_score
parameters.description: Minimum total Parallax score

parameters.name: max_score
parameters.description: Maximum total Parallax score

parameters.name: recommendation
parameters.description: Filter by recommendation (e.g., BUY, STRONG BUY)

parameters.name: activity
parameters.description: Activity filter

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max results (1-100)

example.name: STST SPDR S&P U S EN.SEL SECT.UCITS ETF

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

get.description: Check if an ETF symbol is valid and get its resolved primary RIC.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: ETF symbol to validate (e.g., SPY, QQQ)

get.description: Get historical daily OHLCV price data for an ETF.

parameters.name: symbol
parameters.description: ETF symbol (e.g., SPY, QQQ). Comma-separated for multiple.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 1 year ago.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to latest available.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

post.description: Generate a PDF or HTML portfolio report from the output of the /v1/portfolio/analyze endpoint. This endpoint uses async job processing.

202.description: Job created successfully. Poll the check_url for results.

example.message: Portfolio report generation started. Poll the check_url to get results.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

bearerAuth.description: API key passed as Bearer token

check_url.description: URL to poll for job status

executive_summary.description: 2-3 sentence summary with price, key indicators, and directional bias

trend_analysis.description: Price vs moving averages and trend direction

price_action.description: Support/resistance levels and key price zones

risk_factors.description: Key risk levels and stop-loss guidance

check_url.description: URL to poll for job status

StockReportRequest.description: Request body for stock report generation

symbol.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL.O for Apple Inc)

force.description: Force regeneration even if recent report exists

check_url.description: URL to poll for job status

PortfolioHolding.description: A single portfolio holding entry for a rebalance date

symbol.description: Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL.O for Apple Inc)

portfolio.description: List of holdings with date, symbol, and weight. Weights should sum to 1.0 for each rebalance date. Multiple dates supported for rebalancing.

start_date.description: Analysis start date (YYYY-MM-DD). If not provided, defaults to first rebalance date in portfolio.

end_date.description: Analysis end date (YYYY-MM-DD). If not provided, defaults to yesterday. Future dates are auto-capped to yesterday.

base_currency.description: Base currency for portfolio valuation. Supports USD, SGD, EUR, GBP, JPY, etc.

initial_value.description: Initial portfolio value in base currency. Used to calculate absolute P&L and position sizes.

include_transaction_costs.description: Apply market-specific transaction costs during rebalancing

transaction_cost_config.description: Custom transaction cost rates by market. Format: {'market_name': {'buy': rate, 'sell': rate}}. If not provided, uses default rates.

fields.description: Optional field selection. If omitted, all fields are returned. Use this to reduce response size.

check_url.description: URL to poll for job status

transaction_cost_pct_of_initial.description: Transaction costs as % of initial value

turnover_analysis.description: Portfolio turnover and transaction cost analysis

time_period_returns.description: Returns for various lookback periods (MTD, YTD, 1Y, etc.)

file_url.description: URL to JSON report file (when format=json)

content.description: Full report content (when format=json and include_content=true)

pdf_url.description: URL to PDF report file (when format=pdf)

recommendation.description: STRONG BUY, BUY, HOLD, SELL, STRONG SELL
STRONG BUY, BUY, HOLD, SELL, STRONG SELL

check_url.description: URL to poll for job status

query.description: Natural language query describing the investment theme and any filters
query.example: Find me top 50 electric vehicle companies in Asia

check_url.description: URL to poll for job status

changepercent.description: Percentage price change from previous close

ric.description: Resolved Reuters Instrument Code (null if invalid)

cash_and_short_term_investments.description: Cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments

net_income_starting_line.description: Net income used as starting point

cash_from_financing_activities.description: Net cash from debt and equity transactions

net_change_in_cash.description: Total change in cash for the period

recommendation.description: STRONG BUY, BUY, HOLD, SELL, STRONG SELL

holdings_covered.description: Number of holdings with Parallax scores

weight_covered.description: % of ETF weight covered by scored holdings

reweight.description: Normalized weight across scored holdings only (%)

recommendation.description: STRONG BUY, BUY, HOLD, SELL, STRONG SELL

holdings_covered.description: Number of ETF holdings with Parallax scores

weight_covered.description: Percentage of ETF weight covered by scored holdings

error.description: Error message (only present for invalid symbols)

change.description: Absolute price change from previous close

changepercent.description: Percentage price change from previous close

portfolio_data.description: The complete result from the /v1/portfolio/analyze endpoint

format.description: Output format: pdf, html, or both

check_url.description: URL to poll for job status
